title: Insete Air Freshener Vanilla & Coconut 300ml – X6 Long Lasting Spray for Home, Office & Bathroom – Eliminates Odours, Refreshes Air & Leaves a Pleasant Sweet Scent of Vanilla and Tropical Coconut
features: LONG-LASTING FORMULA: Premium 300ml air freshener spray that provides extended fragrance release for continuous freshness throughout your space
VERSATILE USE: Perfect for multiple locations including homes, offices, bathrooms, and other indoor spaces requiring air freshening
DUAL FRAGRANCE: Combines sweet vanilla notes with tropical coconut scent to create a warm, inviting atmosphere
ODOUR ELIMINATION: Effectively neutralises unwanted odours while releasing a pleasant fragrance that refreshes your environment
EASY APPLICATION: Convenient spray format allows for quick and efficient room freshening with consistent fragrance distribution
description: Transform your living spaces with the delightful Insete Air Freshener in Vanilla & Coconut fragrance. This 300ml spray combines the warm, comforting notes of vanilla with the tropical essence of coconut to create an inviting atmosphere in your home, office, or bathroom. The long-lasting formula effectively neutralises unwanted odours whilst infusing the air with a sweet, pleasant aroma that lingers. Perfect for daily use, this air freshener helps maintain a fresh and welcoming environment throughout the day. The convenient spray format allows for quick and easy application, making it simple to refresh any room whenever needed. Whether you're looking to eliminate cooking smells, freshen up your workspace, or create an inviting bathroom environment, this versatile air freshener delivers consistent results.
